title: Manhattan Butterfly
writer: F. McGrew Willis, Joseph O'Donnell, Lois Buel
actors: Dorothy Granger, William Bakewell, Kenneth Thomson
plot: In New York City, nightclub singer Nina Malone is sought after by wealthy patron Clinton, who offers her a ride home, but when she rejects his advances in the taxi, he accuses her of stealing his money. At the police station, Nina...
